{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323173401859E6ED0AB4D6AE40A68"}"},"total":108},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7606002001117594392","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我感觉很符合我口味，将塔罗牌和斩神结合在一起的元素也很好，而且也没有很生硬的改写人物命运，反而是让他们自己改写自己的命运，能为原著中的自己报仇，这一点我很喜欢。","text_exts":[{"e":14,"s":11,"text":"塔罗牌","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A1%94%E7%BD%97%E7%89%8C&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742584416AE40A68%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227606002001117594392%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227554660762459835417%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A1%94%E7%BD%97%E7%89%8C%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770911967,"group_id":"7554660762459835417","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5E4z81OboC/LYoGa5UG3yEeLu+XU/oU67gSOg6frVd/","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1152767370727101","user_name":"过厝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1152767370727101","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7554660762459835417","book_info":{"abstract":"（无女主，有私设私加剧情，文笔小学生，雷者误入，此处寄存脑子）
高中生洛辰从小被奶奶占卜到自己的命运，他并没有试图改变，平静的接受了自己的死亡。
最关键的时候是奶奶给的锦囊，使一棵大树活了，混沌之树将他带入另一个世界，斩神的世界。
洛辰看着眼前的小气运之子，没忍住逗着玩了一会，把人逗炸毛了。
小林七夜：你是谁？为什么会在这里？
洛辰：我啊，是鬼哦~
在林七夜能感知到周围的时候，洛辰就消失了，只有小小的林七夜见过他。
五年后，在沧南高中，林七夜又一次见到了那个身影，五年过去，他的容貌依然没有变化。
林七夜：你到底是……什么人？
洛辰：我仍然是你的朋友。
再后来遇到危险时，林七夜：相信我，我会没事的。
洛辰拿出塔罗牌
林七夜：诶诶诶！人与人之间的信任呢？放下塔罗牌！
洛辰以为自己会平平淡淡的过完一生，结果后来才发现，自己好像不是穿越……是回归。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d889f74efca41a3ce9b464d70590619","author":"五三妖","author_id":"","book_id":"7554660762459835417","book_name":"斩神：柔弱的塔罗牌师","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c0a088","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":857,"name":"斩神","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=857&name=斩神&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7554660769237844505","read_count":"14836","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"506136"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"255","tags":"男频衍生,穿越,无女主,同人,斩神,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e594b559315839333f253b38b3eb1b6a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779442441&x-signature=fSsmb5v2wZzl4uA%2F%2F8%2BTUO8PfRQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3032931140397099","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"164"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323173401859E6ED0AB4D6AE40A68"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,
